zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Pyne於1642年3月12日之前出生時，他的父親Richard Pyne11639歲，母親Elizabeth Hobbs14歲。他於1666年與Elizabeth在英國英格蘭戴文比曉普斯 尼普頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Pyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Pine
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

historicEvents.title: Gregorian Calendar is Adopted
historicEvents.description: Gregorian calendar was adopted in England in 1752. That year, Wednesday, September 2, 1752, was followed by Thursday, September 14th, 1752, which caused the country to skip ahead eleven days.

historicEvents.title: Seven Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Seven Years' War began as a North American conflict then stretched between England and France. England, along with allies, battled France in America, India, and Europe, making it arguably the first global war. The conflict ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris in 1763 and England was victorious. The Seven Years' war ultimately led to discontent in the colonies and the American Revolution.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Pyne was born before 12 March 1642, his father, Richard Pyne, was 11639 and his mother, Elizabeth Hobbs, was 14. He married Elizabeth in 1666, in Bishops Nympton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Pyneが1642年3月12日以前に生まれた時，父Richard Pyneは11639歳，母Elizabeth Hobbsは14歳であった。1666年にイギリスイギリスデボンビショプス ニーンプトンでElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Pyne(이)가 1642년 3월 12일 이전에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Pyne(은)는 11639세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hobbs(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1666년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 비숍스 니프턴에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Pyne родился перед 12 марта 1642 г., его отцу по имени Richard Pyne было 11639 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hobbs, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth в 1666 г. в местности бишопс нимптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей.
